entity.college_name: College of International Transport and Logistics

establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport (AASTMT)

overview.short_description: The College of International Transport and Logistics at Dokki offers a world-class education in global trade and logistics, combining innovative teaching methods with strong practical and industry-oriented experience. The college prepares students to navigate the complexities of international transport and global supply chains and to make an impact on international markets.
overview.current_status: Active branch-level logistics education with practical learning components and market-oriented program outcomes.
overview.future_prospectus: Developing advanced logistics analytics, transport planning, and international trade competencies through expanded applied training tracks.

training_and_practice.description: Students complete mandatory logistics training, applied supply chain projects, and industry internships with transport and logistics companies.

partner_bodies: industry_and_academic_partners: Multiple local and international partners supporting education, training, and employment opportunities

industry_and_external_relations.industry_and_academic_partners: Multiple local and international partners supporting education, training, and employment opportunities

vision_mission.vision: To be a regional center of excellence in international transport, logistics, and supply chain education, research, and innovation.
vision_mission.mission: To deliver high-quality logistics and transport education through applied training, industry partnerships, and research that supports sustainable economic development and global trade competitiveness.

tie_break_rules.when: If final scores are close (difference <= 0.05), prefer closer campus to student's city.
If one option beats another by a meaningful margin (difference >= 0.12), choose the better option even if farther.
If top program is not available on student's preferred campus, recommend closest alternative within same program_family.
